untranslatable_reason: Stomach Pattern identification requires specific candlestick pattern recognition logic not available in standard indicator list. The pattern formation itself (step 1: 'Identify stomach pattern formation') cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Bar Properties). The confirmation methods (closing price, candle color, opening gap) are approximated using close vs prev_close comparison, but the actual pattern detection requires custom pattern recognition that is outside the scope of this indicator-based rule engine.
translation_notes: Signal references 'Stomach Pattern' which is a specific Japanese candlestick pattern that requires visual/structural pattern recognition. Approximated entry/exit using price direction confirmation (close vs previous close) as a proxy for the reversal confirmation mentioned. Reversal rates (88%, 87%, 85%, etc.) provided in parameters appear to be historical performance statistics rather than tradeable thresholds. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since signal indicates reversals work in both bull and bear markets. Maximum hold period set conservatively to 5 days for a reversal confirmation trade.
